item.title: We Had to Remove the Entire Floor
item.description: Watch the challenging process of removing an entire floor. See the steps, tools, and effort involved in tackling a major renovation or repair project.

media:content.media:title: We Had to Remove the Entire Floor
media:content.media:description: Watch the challenging process of removing an entire floor. See the steps, tools, and effort involved in tackling a major renovation or repair project.

item.title: Testing the New John Deere 830
item.description: Watch the new John Deere 830 in action. See its performance, features, and capabilities as it takes on tough farm tasks in real-world conditions.

media:content.media:title: Testing the New John Deere 830
media:content.media:description: Watch the new John Deere 830 in action. See its performance, features, and capabilities as it takes on tough farm tasks in real-world conditions.

item.title: Brody’s Christmas Present Has Arrived
item.description: Watch the excitement as Brody receives a special Christmas gift. See the unboxing, reactions, and joy of opening a present that makes the holiday unforgettable.

media:content.media:title: Brody’s Christmas Present Has Arrived
media:content.media:description: Watch the excitement as Brody receives a special Christmas gift. See the unboxing, reactions, and joy of opening a present that makes the holiday unforgettable.

item.title: Big Road Trip for Brody and the Planter
item.description: Watch Brody take the planter on a big road trip. See the transport, challenges, and excitement as this essential farm equipment moves to its next destination.

media:content.media:title: Big Road Trip for Brody and the Planter
media:content.media:description: Watch Brody take the planter on a big road trip. See the transport, challenges, and excitement as this essential farm equipment moves to its next destination.

item.title: Cleaning Out the Original Shop Office
item.description: Watch as we clean out the original shop office, discovering a time capsule of tools, papers, and memories. See the surprises hidden in this historic workspace.

media:content.media:title: Cleaning Out the Original Shop Office
media:content.media:description: Watch as we clean out the original shop office, discovering a time capsule of tools, papers, and memories. See the surprises hidden in this historic workspace.

item.title: Custom Combining 200 Acres: We Made a Mess
item.description: Watch the challenges of custom combining 200 acres. See the dust, debris, and teamwork involved in managing a large-scale harvest.

media:content.media:title: Custom Combining 200 Acres: We Made a Mess
media:content.media:description: Watch the challenges of custom combining 200 acres. See the dust, debris, and teamwork involved in managing a large-scale harvest.

item.title: The 2096 Tractor Is Ready to Work
item.description: Watch the 2096 tractor prepped and ready for the field. See the setup, checks, and first tasks as it gets to work on the farm.

media:content.media:title: The 2096 Tractor Is Ready to Work
media:content.media:description: Watch the 2096 tractor prepped and ready for the field. See the setup, checks, and first tasks as it gets to work on the farm.

item.title: Nothing Lasts Forever
item.description: A moment reflecting on change and impermanence. Watch as tools, machines, or situations evolve, reminding us that nothing lasts forever.

media:content.media:title: Nothing Lasts Forever
media:content.media:description: A moment reflecting on change and impermanence. Watch as tools, machines, or situations evolve, reminding us that nothing lasts forever.

item.title: Halo VRT in Action
item.description: Watch the Halo VRT in action on the field. See its performance, precision, and capabilities as it handles farming tasks efficiently.

media:content.media:title: Halo VRT in Action
media:content.media:description: Watch the Halo VRT in action on the field. See its performance, precision, and capabilities as it handles farming tasks efficiently.

item.title: Expensive to Run Green
item.description: See why running this green equipment comes with high costs. A look at fuel, maintenance, and operational challenges that make it expensive to operate.

media:content.media:title: Expensive to Run Green
media:content.media:description: See why running this green equipment comes with high costs. A look at fuel, maintenance, and operational challenges that make it expensive to operate.

item.title: Grain Haul Aftermath: Wrecked Driveway
item.description: Watch the aftermath of a grain haul that damaged the driveway. See the impact, challenges, and efforts needed to assess and repair the mess.

media:content.media:title: Grain Haul Aftermath: Wrecked Driveway
media:content.media:description: Watch the aftermath of a grain haul that damaged the driveway. See the impact, challenges, and efforts needed to assess and repair the mess.

item.title: 5-Foot Frozen Drain: Stinky Fix
item.description: Watch the challenge of fixing a 5-foot frozen, clogged drain. See the tools, techniques, and effort required to restore proper flow and eliminate the odor.

media:content.media:title: 5-Foot Frozen Drain: Stinky Fix
media:content.media:description: Watch the challenge of fixing a 5-foot frozen, clogged drain. See the tools, techniques, and effort required to restore proper flow and eliminate the odor.

item.title: Can We Install Tractor Hubs Ourselves?
item.description: Watch the process of installing hubs on a tractor without professional help. See the tools, steps, and challenges involved in doing it yourself.

media:content.media:title: Can We Install Tractor Hubs Ourselves?
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of installing hubs on a tractor without professional help. See the tools, steps, and challenges involved in doing it yourself.
